Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&MailTemplatePath = !"C:\Program Files (x86)\GeneXus\GeneXus17\Packages\Patterns\WorkWithPlus\Resources\MailNotificationTemplate.html"
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Do 'Update Notification Definitions' Do 'Import Mail Template'
Commit
Sub 'Update Notification Definitions'
&WWP_NotificationDefinitionCollection = WWP_AutomaticNotificationDefinitionsToLoad() For &WWP_NotificationDefinition In &WWP_NotificationDefinitionCollection &WWPNotificationDefinitionId = WWP_GetNotificationDefinitionByName(&WWP_NotificationDefinition.WWPNotificationDefinitionName, &WWP_NotificationDefinition.WWPEntityId) If &WWPNotificationDefinitionId > 0 Msg(format(!'Updating Notification %1...', &WWP_NotificationDefinition.WWPNotificationDefinitionName), status) &WWP_NotificationDefinitionToUpdate.Load(&WWPNotificationDefinitionId) &WWP_NotificationDefinitionToUpdate.WWPNotificationDefinitionAllowUserSubscription = &WWP_NotificationDefinition.WWPNotificationDefinitionAllowUserSubscription &WWP_NotificationDefinitionToUpdate.WWPNotificationDefinitionAppliesTo = &WWP_NotificationDefinition.WWPNotificationDefinitionAppliesTo &WWP_NotificationDefinitionToUpdate.WWPNotificationDefinitionDescription = &WWP_NotificationDefinition.WWPNotificationDefinitionDescription &WWP_NotificationDefinitionToUpdate.WWPNotificationDefinitionIcon = &WWP_NotificationDefinition.WWPNotificationDefinitionIcon &WWP_NotificationDefinitionToUpdate.WWPNotificationDefinitionLink = &WWP_NotificationDefinition.WWPNotificationDefinitionLink &WWP_NotificationDefinitionToUpdate.WWPNotificationDefinitionLongDescription = &WWP_NotificationDefinition.WWPNotificationDefinitionLongDescription &WWP_NotificationDefinitionToUpdate.WWPNotificationDefinitionShortDescription = &WWP_NotificationDefinition.WWPNotificationDefinitionShortDescription &WWP_NotificationDefinitionToUpdate.WWPNotificationDefinitionTitle = &WWP_NotificationDefinition.WWPNotificationDefinitionTitle &WWP_NotificationDefinitionToUpdate.WWPNotificationDefinitionSecFuncionality = &WWP_NotificationDefinition.WWPNotificationDefinitionSecFuncionality &WWP_NotificationDefinitionToUpdate.Save() If &WWP_NotificationDefinitionToUpdate.Fail() Msg(!"Error: " + &WWP_NotificationDefinitionToUpdate.GetMessages().ToJson(), status) EndIf Else Msg(format(!'Creating Notification %1...', &WWP_NotificationDefinition.WWPNotificationDefinitionName), status) &WWP_NotificationDefinition.Save() If &WWP_NotificationDefinition.Fail() Msg(!"Error: " + &WWP_NotificationDefinition.GetMessages().ToJson(), status) EndIf EndIf EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'Import Mail Template'
&MailTemplate.Load(!"MailNotification") If &MailTemplate.Fail() Msg(!'Importing Mail template...', status) &TemplateFile.Source = &MailTemplatePath
&MailTemplate = new() &MailTemplate.WWPMailTemplateName = !"MailNotification" &MailTemplate.WWPMailTemplateDescription = !"Template for sending notifications"
WWPBaseObjects.WWP_GetParameter.Text(!"Sender_Name", &SenderName) &MailTemplate.WWPMailTemplateSenderName = &SenderName
WWPBaseObjects.WWP_GetParameter.Text(!"Sender_Address", &SenderAddress) &MailTemplate.WWPMailTemplateSenderAddress = &SenderAddress
&MailTemplate.WWPMailTemplateSubject = !"New notification" &MailTemplate.WWPMailTemplateBody = &TemplateFile.ReadAllText() &MailTemplate.Save() EndIf
EndSub
